name: Amaretto Balls
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Crisco, or 1/2 block of paraffin
recipeInstructions:
1. Put all ingredients, except the chocolate chips and paraffin, in a large plastic bag.
2. Mix together well by kneading outside of the plastic bag.
3. When completely blended, form small balls and place on waxed paper in one layer.
4. Chill quickly in the freezer for about 20 minutes (uncovered).
5. Meanwhile, melt chocolate chips with 1/2 block of paraffin or 2 tablespoons Crisco shortening in a double boiler over medium to low heat.
6. When the candy balls are chilled, dip them one at a time in the melted chocolate.
7. Store in a cool place.
